docs.name: Interactive Cursor
docs.description: Spring-smoothed cursor overlay with magnetic hover states, click ripples, optional particles, and support for full-page or container-scoped interactions.

props.name: color
props.description: Primary color for the cursor dot.

props.name: clickColor
props.description: Ripple and particle color used on click.

props.name: glow
props.description: Enables the trailing glow around the cursor.

props.name: trailColor
props.description: Color of the outer ring and trailing glow.

props.name: magneticPull
props.description: Snaps the cursor toward interactive elements such as buttons and links.

props.name: hideSystemCursor
props.description: Hides the native cursor while the component is mounted.

props.name: containerRef
props.description: Optional ref limiting the interaction area to a specific container instead of the full window.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes applied to the overlay root.

docs.overview: InteractiveCursor replaces the native cursor with a custom animated dot and ring that react to clicks with particle bursts and ripple rings. Uses a React portal so it renders above all other layers.

scenarios.title: Branded cursor on a marketing page
scenarios.description: Replace the default cursor with a branded one that matches your primary accent colour.

scenarios.title: Interactive demo showcase
scenarios.description: Enable the cursor on a dedicated component showcase page to enhance the sense of interactivity.
